title: crataegus dahurica var. dahurica
intro: Crataegus dahurica var. dahurica, also known as the Dahurian hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to protect the heart and cardiovascular system. The health benefits of Dahurian hawthorn include lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of heart disease, and improving overall cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
